text: Hello world. This tokenizer demo uses a tiny public-style sample.
Transformers learn patterns from repeated text examples.
机器学习项目需要清晰的数据边界和可复现的流程。
我们只保留少量样本数据，方便演示训练脚本。
A small corpus is enough to verify the tokenizer pipeline.
公开仓库中不提交大规模训练语料和模型权重。
The original full datasets were collected from open-source materials.
This repository keeps only a minimal runnable subset.
